hero.title: Pure Nutrition for Your Little One
hero.subtitle: Scientifically formulated baby nutrition trusted by parents worldwide.

featured.title: Featured Products
featured.subtitle: Carefully crafted for every stage of growth

promo.title: See How We Care
promo.description: Watch our story and learn about our commitment to quality.

lactonicGold1.name: Lactonic Gold 1
lactonicGold1.description: A premium starter infant formula based on cow's milk, enriched with DHA to support brain development from birth to 6 months.

lactonicGold2.name: Lactonic Gold 2
lactonicGold2.description: A follow-on formula enriched with iron and essential nutrients to support your baby's continued growth from 6 to 12 months.

lactolacGold3.name: Lactolac Gold 3
lactolacGold3.description: A growing-up formula fortified with calcium and key vitamins to support the development of active toddlers from 1 to 3 years.

easeToGo1.name: Ease to Go 1
easeToGo1.description: An easy-to-prepare infant formula based on cow's milk, designed to meet the nutritional needs of babies from birth to 6 months.

easeToGo2.name: Ease to Go 2
easeToGo2.description: A convenient follow-on formula that supports healthy growth and development for babies from 6 to 12 months.

easeToGo3.name: Ease 2 Go 3
easeToGo3.description: A growing-up formula that is easy to prepare and provides balanced nutrition for toddlers from 1 to 3 years.

lactonicAC.name: Lactonic AC Gold
lactonicAC.description: An anti-colic formula specially designed to reduce gas and discomfort, helping your baby feed comfortably.

lactonicAR.name: Lactonic AR Gold
lactonicAR.description: A thickened anti-regurgitation formula that helps reduce spitting up and keeps your baby comfortable after feeding.

lactonicHA1.name: Lactonic HA Plus 1
lactonicHA1.description: A hypoallergenic infant formula for babies from birth to 6 months who are at risk of allergy, used under medical supervision.

lactonicHA2.name: Lactonic HA Plus 2
lactonicHA2.description: A hypoallergenic follow-on formula for babies from 6 to 12 months with cow's milk protein sensitivity, used under medical supervision.

lactonicHA3.name: Lactonic HA Plus 3
lactonicHA3.description: A hypoallergenic growing-up formula for toddlers from 1 to 3 years with cow's milk protein sensitivity, used under medical supervision.

lactonicLF.name: Lactonic LF
lactonicLF.description: A lactose-free infant formula formulated for babies with lactose intolerance or galactosaemia, for use under medical supervision.

lactonic3Fruits.name: 3 Fruits
lactonic3Fruits.description: A smooth fruit puree blending three natural fruits, gluten-free with no added sugar, ideal for babies from 4 months.

lactonic4FruitsCookie.name: 4 Fruits with Cookie
lactonic4FruitsCookie.description: A tasty blend of four fruits with soft cookie pieces, rich in fibre and Vitamin C, suitable for babies from 6 months.

lactonicBabyKabsah.name: Baby Kabsah
lactonicBabyKabsah.description: A savoury steamed meal inspired by classic Kabsah, low in fat and salt with a good source of protein, for babies from 6 months.

lactonicFruitCereals.name: Fruit and Cereals
lactonicFruitCereals.description: A wholesome blend of fruit and cereals with no added sugar, gluten-free and enriched with Vitamin C, for babies from 6 months.

lactonicVegetableBeef.name: Vegetables with Beef
lactonicVegetableBeef.description: A nutritious steamed meal combining tender beef with fresh vegetables, gluten-free and low in fat, for babies from 6 months.
